57.reason: [The second argument to qsort should be 'all', not 'all-1'. This causes the last group to be excluded from sorting, potentially missing the correct maximum.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The second argument to qsort should be 'all', not 'all-1'. This causes the last group to be excluded from sorting, potentially missing the correct maximum.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The second argument to qsort should be 'all', not 'all-1', because 'all' is the number of valid elements in the 'total' array. Using 'all-1' skips the last group during sorting, which may cause the maximum-length group to be missed.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [The second argument to qsort should be 'all', not 'all-1', because 'all' is the number of valid groups in the 'total' array. Using 'all-1' excludes the last group from sorting, which may cause incorrect output when the longest chain is the last one added.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [The second argument to qsort should be 'all', not 'all-1'. This causes the last group to be excluded from sorting, potentially leading to incorrect maximum selection.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [The second argument to qsort should be 'all', not 'all-1', because 'all' is the number of valid elements in the 'total' array. Using 'all-1' skips the last group during sorting, which may cause the wrong group to be selected as the longest.]
